applications.description: Erection of a single storey extension with flat roof to rear and single storey infill extension to front of dwelling, PV installation to pitched roof and new access and parking (part-retrospective)
AMENDED PLANS: Demolition of the central library building and creation of public realm including hard and soft landscape scheme with trees, planting, and street furniture.
Listed Building Consent for 3 replacement doors to property with fanlight and 2 side panels

Display of 1 externally illuminated fascia sign, 1 internally illuminated wall mounted logo, 2 internally illuminated projecting signs, 3 internally illuminated ATM machine tablets & manifestation lines to glazing to replace existing signs
Erection of a single storey rear extension to dwelling.
Erection of a single storey extension to rear of garage to create a granny flat bedroom and ensuite in rear half of garage.
Erection of a single-storey rear extension including demolition of existing extension and erection of a two-storey side extension with partial canopy to front elevation.
Erection of front porch extension and rear two storey pitched roof extension following the removal of the existing conservatory (being resubmission of application 22/02295/FUL)
Erection of double storey side extension with internal reconfiguration to create additional bedroom and bathroom following demolition of single garage and utility
Conversion of a disused barn to form a new dwelling, including extensions and external alterations to facilitate the conversion
